name: Jute
overview: Jute is a fiber crop used in eco-friendly packaging.
growth: Grows in warm, humid climates with alluvial soil.

name: Sugarcane
overview: Sugarcane is a tall tropical grass grown for sugar production.
growth: Thrives in hot, sunny climates with abundant water and fertile soil.
season: Planted in February–April, harvested in November–March.
uses: Sugar, ethanol, molasses, paper, animal feed.
benefits: High yield, supports sugar industry and biofuel production.

name: Cotton
overview: Cotton is a soft fiber crop used mainly in textile production.
growth: Requires warm climate, moderate rainfall, and well-drained soil.
season: Sown in April–May, harvested in October–January.
benefits: High demand, export potential, supports textile industry.
